---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for the cohort platform, landing page, or skill
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Business Impact / Real-Life Benefit
<!-- What real problem does this solve? Who benefits? How much? -->

## Innovation
<!-- What's non-obvious about this? Why hasn't someone already done it? -->

## Proposed Implementation
<!-- How would this work? Be as concrete as you can. -->

## Success Metric
<!-- How will we know this feature worked? -->

## Effort Estimate
<!-- Small (< 2h) / Medium (2–8h) / Large (> 8h) -->

## Are you willing to build it?
- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] I can help review
- [ ] Just the idea — someone else can build it
